blocks.task: Monkey VM performance: benchmark compiler+VM vs tree-walker. How much faster is the bytecode path? What are the bottlenecks?

blocks.task: Fix EXISTS subquery for correlated queries
blocks.summary: Fixed correlated EXISTS subquery. Root cause: decorrelate optimizer isCorrelated() conflated table names with aliases. FROM t t2 had innerTables={t,t2} instead of {t2}, making outer ref t.a appear inner. Fix: only add alias to innerTables. Also enhanced _resolveColumn for qualified names. All 656 test files pass.
blocks.details: Fixed correlated EXISTS subquery. Root cause: decorrelate optimizer isCorrelated() conflated table names with aliases. FROM t t2 had innerTables={t,t2} instead of {t2}, making outer ref t.a appear inner. Fix: only add alias to innerTables. Also enhanced _resolveColumn for qualified names. All 656 test files pass.
